articles.author: Charlotte Graham-McLay, John Pye
articles.title: 6 members of the Iranian women’s soccer team granted asylum in Australia - AP News
articles.description: Two more members of the Iranian women’s soccer team were granted asylum in Australia before their teammates departed, but one of the woman later changed her mind and will return to Iran. Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke told reporters Wednesday the pair was r…
articles.content: GOLD COAST, Australia (AP) A total of six members of the Iranian womens soccer team will remain in Australia, Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke said Wednesday, after one of the squad members earlier g… [+5144 chars]
